items.summary: Replace the current logo image (lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png) in the Navigation component with the newly uploaded logo file (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png), saved as a new asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Ensure proper sizing and responsive behavior across desktop and mobile viewports.

Update the favicon reference in frontend/index.html to use the newly uploaded logo image (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png) stored under frontend/public/assets/generated/.
Update the BooksPage hero banner to use the newly uploaded logo image (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png) wherever the previous logo was referenced.

Audit all other frontend components (Footer, ProfileSetupModal, authentication pages, and any remaining components) for references to the old logo (lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png) and update each to use the newly uploaded logo image.
